title: How can we help you?
subtitle: Search for answers, or send a message directly to the HR team.
searchPlaceholder: Search for articles, guides, or questions...

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I request time off?
faq.a1: Navigate to the Time Off page from the sidebar. Click "Request Leave", select your leave type and dates, then submit the form. Your manager will be notified automatically.
faq.q2: How do I update my profile?
faq.a2: Go to Settings > General to update your name, email, phone number, and bio. Click "Save Changes" when done.
faq.q3: Where can I view my attendance records?
faq.a3: Click on "Attendance" in the sidebar to view your check-in/check-out history, working hours, and attendance statistics.
faq.q4: How do I change my password?
faq.a4: Go to Settings > Security. Enter your current password, then your new password twice. Click "Update Password" to save.
faq.q5: Who do I contact for HR questions?
faq.a5: You can send a message directly from this page using the contact form below, or email the HR team at hr@aiya.ai.
faq.q6: How do I view my leave balance?
faq.a6: Go to the Time Off page to see your remaining balance for each leave type. Balances are updated automatically when requests are approved.
faq.q7: Can I cancel a leave request?
faq.a7: Yes, you can cancel pending requests from the Time Off page. Approved requests can be cancelled but will require manager confirmation.

bankTemplate.title: B.A.N.K. Personality Assessment
bankTemplate.nurturing_1: I always look for opportunities to help and serve others
bankTemplate.blueprint_1: I believe it is important to follow the rules
bankTemplate.knowledge_1: I place a very high value on competence
bankTemplate.blueprint_2: I value predictability in my life
bankTemplate.knowledge_2: I make decisions based on analysis and good data
bankTemplate.nurturing_2: I tend to be empathetic and gentle toward most people
bankTemplate.action_2: I want to be a leader
bankTemplate.nurturing_3: I feel happy when I give to charity
bankTemplate.blueprint_3: I like to have systems and step-by-step procedures to follow
bankTemplate.knowledge_3: I place a high value on expertise
bankTemplate.action_3: I want to be the center of attention
bankTemplate.knowledge_4: I place a very high value on intelligence
bankTemplate.nurturing_4: I am passionate about supporting causes I believe in
bankTemplate.blueprint_4: I am disciplined and like to follow rules, guidelines, and schedules
bankTemplate.action_5: I desire a lifestyle of fame and fortune
bankTemplate.knowledge_5: I value science and the scientific method
bankTemplate.blueprint_5: I value certainty more than change
bankTemplate.nurturing_5: It is very important for me to create deep connections with others

templateSection.title: Templates
templateSection.itEvalDesc: Evaluate IT staff across 8 competency areas
templateSection.bankDesc: Assess employee personality traits across 4 dimensions

template.useTemplateDesc: Pre-fill with IT Performance Evaluation (24 questions, 8 categories)
template.templateApplied: Template applied! You can edit questions before creating.
template.title: IT Staff Performance Evaluation
template.communication_1: How effectively does this employee communicate technical concepts to non-technical team members?
template.communication_2: How well does this employee present ideas and provide updates during meetings?
template.communication_3: How effectively does this employee document their work and share knowledge with the team?
template.teamwork_1: How well does this employee collaborate with team members on shared projects?
template.teamwork_2: How willing is this employee to help colleagues when they face challenges?
template.teamwork_3: How effectively does this employee contribute to a positive and supportive team environment?
template.problemSolving_1: How effectively does this employee analyze and break down complex technical problems?
template.problemSolving_2: How well does this employee identify root causes rather than just addressing symptoms?
template.problemSolving_3: How creative and practical are this employee's proposed solutions?
template.timeManagement_1: How well does this employee prioritize tasks and meet deadlines?
template.timeManagement_2: How effectively does this employee estimate effort and manage their workload?
template.timeManagement_3: How well does this employee balance multiple projects without compromising quality?
template.adaptability_1: How quickly does this employee adapt to new technologies, tools, or processes?
template.adaptability_2: How well does this employee handle unexpected changes in project requirements?
template.adaptability_3: How open is this employee to receiving and acting on constructive feedback?
template.technicalSkills_1: How proficient is this employee in the core technologies required for their role?
template.technicalSkills_2: How well does this employee follow coding best practices and standards?
template.technicalSkills_3: How effectively does this employee debug and troubleshoot technical issues?
template.innovationLearning_1: How proactively does this employee seek out new technologies and learning opportunities?
template.innovationLearning_2: How often does this employee suggest improvements to existing processes or systems?
template.innovationLearning_3: How well does this employee apply newly acquired knowledge to their daily work?
template.qualityResponsibility_1: How consistently does this employee deliver high-quality work with attention to detail?
template.qualityResponsibility_2: How well does this employee take ownership of their tasks and follow through to completion?
template.qualityResponsibility_3: How reliably does this employee test and review their own work before submission?

bankResult.BlueprintDesc: You value systems, structure, and predictability. You follow rules and prefer step-by-step procedures.
bankResult.ActionDesc: You are driven by results, speed, and excitement. You take risks and desire to lead.
bankResult.NurturingDesc: You focus on relationships, empathy, and helping others. You create deep connections.
bankResult.KnowledgeDesc: You prioritize data, analysis, and expertise. You value intelligence and the scientific method.
